dern's support assistant. I can help with orders, tracking, product questions, and more!

Today
Hi! I'm looking for a gift for someone and I'm not sure what to pick — can you help?

Absolutely, I’d love to help you find the perfect gift! 🎁 Could you share a little bit about who you’re shopping for or what kinds of things they like? For example, are they into coffee, water bottles, outdoor adventures, or something else? Any details will help me point you in the right direction!

turns.q: It's for someone who likes quality but isn't fussy; I want something they'll actually use.
turns.replyTail:
n!

It's for someone who likes quality but isn't fussy; I want something they'll actually use.

That’s such a thoughtful approach! 😊 It sounds like you want something practical, reliable, and good-looking—something they’ll reach for every day. We have a variety of options that fit that vibe, from drinkware to handy bags and accessories. If you’d like, I can suggest a few best-sellers that are known for their quality and everyday usefulness. Would you like some recommendations?

turns.q: My budget is moderate — what would make a good gift in that range?
turns.replyTail:
range?

Great question! With a moderate budget, you have lots of lovely options that balance quality and practicality. Our insulated tumblers and water bottles are super popular—they keep drinks cold all day and are easy to clean, so they’re perfect for everyday use. We also have some handy accessories and bags that make thoughtful gifts.

If you want suggestions for a specific type of item (like drinkware or bags), just let me know your preference and I can share a few ideas!

Powered by Siena

turns.q: Between your top two gift ideas, which feels more special?
turns.replyTail:
eas!

Between your top two gift ideas, which feels more special?

Both options are wonderful, but if you want your gift to feel extra special, I’d lean toward a stylish everyday bag—like our Fletcher Backpack or Getaway Bag. Bags have that wow factor and feel like a thoughtful treat, while still being super practical for daily use. Tumblers are always a hit, but a great bag can really stand out as a memorable gift. 🎁✨ Let me know if you want details or links for either option!

Powered by Siena

turns.q: Is there a gift set or bundle that looks nicer than a single item?
turns.replyTail:
than a single item?

We don’t have a specific gift set or bundle at the moment, but some of our products—like the Getaway Bag—come with thoughtful extras, such as a detachable, water-resistant pocket. This makes them feel more special and substantial than a typical single item! If you’d like, I can help you find other options that have a gift-worthy feel or suggest ways to create a personalized bundle. Just let me know what you’re looking for!

turns.q: Can it arrive gift-ready, and how fast can it ship?
turns.replyTail:
ipping slip—so it still works well as a surprise! 🎁

For shipping, orders are typically fulfilled in 1-3 business days and then take another 4-8 business days to arrive with standard shipping. Most orders arrive on the quicker side of that 5-11 business day window. If you’re shipping to the contiguous 48 states and your order is over $30, shipping is free!

You can find more details here: https://www.simplemodern.com/pages/shipping

Let me know if you have any other questions!

turns.q: Great — add your top gift pick to my cart and tell me the total.
turns.replyTail:
add items to your cart directly, but you can easily do it by visiting the Getaway Bag page and selecting your favorite color. The price will show right on the page, and once you add it to your cart, you'll see the total at checkout—including any shipping (which is free if your order is over $30 in the U.S.).

If you run into any issues adding it to your cart, just let me know what device and browser you're using, and I can help troubleshoot! 😊
